title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!
